title: Specialist (Learning Needs, LSN)
description:
Specialist, Leaning Needs (LSN) - multiple headcount & locations

About the role:
Care Corner Learning and Special Needs Support (formerly Educational Therapy Service) is looking to expand our focus from just educational therapy to providing wholistic support for children with learning and special needs. We
are seeking a Specialist with a passion to support children with learning and special needs. This individual would ideally have experience teaching children individually or in small group sizes, open to working from different
locations and keen to teach children in our own Intervention Programme.


Roles & Responsibilities:

  • •Plan and teach English and Math to children (age 5 to 12) with learning difficulties/disabilities

  • Plan and conduct individual and group intervention programmes/activities for children with special needs

  • Assess the developmental needs of children, doing up each child’s Individual Educational Programme (IEP) and

  • Progress Report (PR) to address the needs of the children in the assigned classes.

  • Engage parents in executing intervention and development strategies for the children.


Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma in Early Childhood/ Pre-School Teaching/ Early Years/ Special Education, Learning Disorders

  • Management or any other related fields

  • Advanced Diploma in Early Childhood Intervention (Special Needs) will be preferred.

  • Experience in specialised intervention methods with children will be an added advantage (e.g. OG, Jolly Phonics visual processing training, rhythmic movement training)

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.

Role levels: hiring requirement for minimum experience to Senior Specialist level


Location: required to work from different centres and multiple location requirements for Woodlands/Toa Payoh/Tampines

Thank you for your interest and application. We regret that only shortlisted applicants will be notified for interview.

If you need assistance, contact our talent acquisition team at joinus@carecorner.org.sg.

You may use this link to apply directly to us - Careers

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1981, Care Corner Singapore has been a steadfast pillar of support for those in need and the less privileged within our community. Our journey spans over decades, dedicated to making a meaningful difference in the lives of others. At the heart of what we do is our core values of integrity, Compassion, Authenticity, Respect and Excellence as we continuously strive to develop new innovative programmes to support the needs of our community.


At Care Corner, we offer a positive and collaborative work environment that promotes staff wellbeing and believes in the development and growth of our people. We recognise that our employees are our greatest asset.


Join our team and be part of an innovative organisation where every role contributes to making a meaningful difference in the lives of individuals and families. Whether you are an experienced professional or just starting your career, if you are seeking a rewarding opportunity to be part of something bigger than yourself, we invite you to apply today.


Visit us at www.carecorner.org.sg to learn more about our organisation and available opportunities.
